meaning: 1. to be discharged from military service
sentence: 他退伍后回到家乡开了一家小餐馆。
pinyin: Tā tuìwǔ hòu huídào jiāxiāng kāi le yī jiā xiǎo cānguǎn.
english: After being discharged from the military, he returned to his hometown and opened a small restaurant.

sentence: 这条航道水深，适合大型船只通行。
pinyin: Zhè tiáo hángdào shuǐ shēn, shìhé dàxíng chuánzhī tōngxíng.
english: This waterway is deep and suitable for large vessels to pass through.

meaning: 1. to serve in the army; 2. to be a soldier
sentence: 他十八岁就去当兵了，在部队待了五年。
pinyin: Tā shíbā suì jiù qù dāngbīng le, zài bùduì dāi le wǔ nián.
english: He enlisted in the army at eighteen and spent five years in the military.

sentence: 这篇文章里有几处明显的谬误。
pinyin: Zhè piān wénzhāng lǐ yǒu jǐ chù míngxiǎn de miùwù.
english: There are several obvious errors in this article.

meaning: 1. to occur at the same time (of two things); 2. to be mingled; 3. to
sentence: 那天风雪交加，我们只好待在家里。
pinyin: Nà tiān fēng xuě jiāo jiā, wǒmen zhǐhǎo dāi zài jiā lǐ.
english: That day there was a storm of wind and snow, so we had no choice but to stay home.
